heroHeading: Get answers and transform your life
heroSubtext: Discover the missing piece to achieving lasting change, and the life you deserve
resultsSubtext: There comes a time in life when you find yourself on a challenging path, but can't find a clear way through.

perhapsItems.text: At a crossroads, struggling to make a decision
Experiencing a big life change, like becoming a parent, or a house move
In a relationship dynamic that no longer serves you
Fed up of being the supporting role in everyone else's life
Bored of putting your own goals on pause, but struggling to make progress

bannerText: You're done going through the motions —
problemBody:
Friends, family, and online courses might have your best interest at heart, but they're not getting you where you want to be.

**Why?**

Because they're asking the wrong questions.

Too often, we find ourselves deferring to others for the answer, switching to autopilot, or hustling even more when things get hard.
solutionBody:
You need a guiding light with the right roadmap, tools, and qualifications to help you truly look within.

**That's where real transformation begins.**

There's a missing piece that can make things so much simpler, if you just know how to access it:
philosophyQuote: Success in your outer journey starts with your inner journey.
philosophyBody:
My own experience over ten years ago taught me this profound truth.

Traditional coaching or advice doesn't properly teach us how to get curious, develop self-compassion, or gently grow our confidence as we find the answer, because we're too focussed on the external. Our judgement stays clouded.
philosophyBannerPrefix: But when you know the first step is looking inward,
philosophyClosingPrefix: If you're ready to make some real decisions, let go of old habits, and bring purpose into your life again,
timelineSubtext: This roadmap helps you move from overthinking to clear, confident action, so that you can build a life you're proud of.

timelineSteps.title: Awareness Breakthrough
timelineSteps.subtitle: The Self-Audit
timelineSteps.description: Get curious about your story. We'll audit your self‑beliefs, map where you feel stuck, and uncover repeating patterns. By week 4, you'll have a new perspective.

timelineSteps.title: Refocusing Method
timelineSteps.subtitle: Refocus & Reframe
timelineSteps.description: Work on emotions underpinning your stories. Learn emotional intelligence scripts, speak with self-compassion, and let go of limiting beliefs through gentle accountability.

timelineSteps.title: Integration
timelineSteps.subtitle: Clarity to Confidence
timelineSteps.description: Integrate insights into everyday life. Practise new habits, set boundaries, and step out of your comfort zone. Your clarity translates into decisive action.

bonusText: Resources for continued growth beyond the programme
ctaSectionBody:
Decisions might feel hard right now. Start with a free discovery call to find out if my coaching can help you.

**We'll do the figuring out together.**
